suite.name: TC01 Create NIN Report Header add new fields and Send SMS

kw.name: Open Trouble Ticket System TTS Web
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "args": ["--start-maximized"], "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "D:\\Automate_NIN\\testcase\\browser\\traces\\temp\\591485a9-9680-485e-8b0b-622243a33567"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": true, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": null }

{'acceptDownloads': True, 'bypassCSP': False, 'forcedColors': 'none', 'ignoreHTTPSErrors': True, 'javaScriptEnabled': True, 'offline': False, 'reducedMotion': 'no-preference', 'serviceWorkers': 'allow', 'viewport': None}
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://testtts.intra.ais/login-tts
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

test.name: Prerequisite

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=txtUsername at state visible

test.doc: 1)TTS Create NIN Report Header shall display new field: Service Group select all network group as default.

test.name: TC01_002: Report Header display new field : Test SMS

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

test.doc: 1)TTS Create NIN Report Header shall display new field: Test SMS with the phone number of NIN creator set as default.

test.name: TC01_003: Report Header update mobile number field : Test SMS

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: 1) TTS Create NIN Report Header can updated the mobile number forTest SMS success.

test.name: TC01_004: Create NIN Fault from TT Not Send Test SMS

kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

test.doc:
1) TTS Create NIN Fault from TT success, and the Service group and Test SMS fields are displayed with the entered values.
2) TTS Sender:NINFaultTest sent the SMS to Mobile no : 0812345678 for Level : ISI success.

test.doc:
1) TTS can not Create NIN Fault from TT success, and display warning as below:
2) " กรุณากรอก mobileNo "
3) " กรุณากรอก mobileNo ให้ถูกต้อง (ตัวอย่าง: 0XXXXXXXXX) "

kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=body-container-content at state stable
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

test.doc: 1) TTS shall display the disable field Affect Area with the auto-filled data from TT, base on the Problem Node and Affected Node as below:

test.name: TC02_004: Problem details displays Auto-filled the data from TT - Field Affect Area : Region

kw.name: Verify Auto-filled the data from TT: Region
Scroll To Element
kw.doc: This method waits for actionability checks, then tries to scroll element into view, unless it is completely visible.

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Automate Test create nin from TT not send Test SMS' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Scroll To Element
kw.doc: This method waits for actionability checks, then tries to scroll element into view, unless it is completely visible.

kw.name: Take Screenshot

test.doc: 1) TTS shall display field Affect Area and enable field: Region with the auto-filled data from TT, base on the Problem Node and Affected Node as below:

test.name: TC02_007: Create NIN from TT Affect Area : Region

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=txtNetworkEffect at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Automate Test format Event1 JB25-2345678 (08:25) Link ME-9008-13 (Ban Khao To) Down.Status:RON is on site.' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=txtCause at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Automate RON is repairing OFC at first event.' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fetch From Right
kw.doc: Returns contents of the ``string`` after the last occurrence of ``marker``.

kw.name: Fetch From Left
kw.doc: Returns contents of the ``string`` before the first occurrence of ``marker``.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=txtRelateTTId at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

test.doc:
1) TTS Create NIN from TT success, and the Affected Area is displayed correctly with auto-filled data from TT based on the Problem Node and Affected Node.
2) Affected Area (Region) : Bangkok

2) Affected Area : Nationwide

test.name: TC02_011: Modify NIN Affect Area : Region

test.doc:
1) TTS Modify NIN displays the Affected Area with the current data as below:
Affected Area (Region) : Bangkok
2) The user can update more Region for the Affect Area success, and the data is saves correctly.
Affected Area (Region) : Bangkok, Central

test.name: TC02_012: Modify NIN Affect Area : Province

test.doc:
1) TTS Modify NIN displays the Affected Area with the current data as below:
Affected Area (Province) : BANGKOK
2) The user can update more Province for the Affect Area success, and the data is saves correctly.
Affected Area (Province) : BANGKOK, NONTHABURI

test.name: TC02_013: Modify NIN Affect Area : District

test.doc:
1) TTS Modify NIN displays the Affected Area with the current data as below:
Affected Area (District) : Bang Bon, Bang Kho Leam, Kannayao
2) The user can update more District for the Affect Area success, and the data is saves correctly.
Affected Area (District) : Bang Bon, Bang Kho Leam, Kannayao,Bang Khae

test.name: TC02_014: Modify NIN Affect Area : Nationwide to Region

kw.msg: Fills the text '000036' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=btnSearch at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector td.tdNinId at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector div.content :text-is("Modify NIN") at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=txtRelateTTId at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

test.doc:
1) TTS Modify NIN displays the Affected Area with the current data as below:
Affected Area : Nationwide
2) The user can update Nationwide to Region for the Affect Area success, and the data is saves correctly.
Affected Area (Region) : Central, East, North

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

stat.name: TC01 Create NIN Report Header add new fields and Send SMS

suite.stat: TC01 Create NIN Report Header add new fields and Send SMS
